name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: Rich pork bone broth with chashu pork, soft-boiled egg, bamboo shoots, and nori.

name: Spicy Miso Ramen
description: House miso broth with chili oil, ground pork, corn, and scallions.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Classic carbonara with guanciale, egg, pecorino romano, and black pepper.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, basil, extra virgin olive oil.

name: Ashmont Burger
description: 8oz grass-fed beef, caramelized onion, aged cheddar, house sauce, brioche bun.

name: Mac and Cheese
description: House mac with gruyere, sharp cheddar, and breadcrumb crust.

name: Pho Bo Dac Biet
description: Special beef pho with filet, brisket, tendon, and meatballs in rich bone broth.

name: Banh Mi Thit Nuong
description: Grilled pork banh mi with pickled daikon, jalapeno, and sriracha mayo.

name: Tacos de Carnitas
description: Three corn tortilla tacos with braised pork, onion, cilantro, and salsa verde.

name: 16 Inch Pepperoni Pizza
description: House tomato sauce, whole milk mozzarella, and cup-and-char pepperoni.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tandoor-cooked chicken in creamy tomato masala sauce. Served with basmati rice and naan.

name: Saag Paneer
description: Fresh spinach and paneer in spiced sauce. Served with rice and garlic naan.

name: Peking Duck (Half)
description: Crispy-skinned Peking duck with pancakes, scallions, cucumber, and hoisin sauce.

name: Salt and Pepper Shrimp
description: Crispy fried shrimp with garlic, scallion, and house salt-pepper seasoning.

name: Oxtail Stew
description: Slow-braised oxtail in rich gravy with rice and cabbage. House specialty.

name: Fried Chicken Dinner
description: Two pieces crispy fried chicken with mac and cheese, cornbread, and greens.

name: Curry Goat
description: Slow-cooked goat in Jamaican curry with rice and peas. Very popular.

name: Jerk Chicken Plate
description: Grilled jerk chicken with festival dumplings, rice and peas, and plantain.

name: Classic Boston Burger
description: Double smash burger with American cheese, pickles, mustard, and house sauce.

name: Cannoli (2 pieces)
description: Classic Sicilian cannoli with fresh ricotta filling and chocolate chips.
